heading: Trust fund
label: 1772c Trust fund
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, all moneys of the Board shall be treated as trust funds for the purpose of section 906(a)(2) of title 2. This section is effective for fiscal year 1986 and every fiscal year thereafter.1See References in Text note below.1
